title: litchi chinensis subsp. chinensis
intro: Litchi chinensis subsp. chinensis, also known as the Chinese litchi or litchi tree, is a deciduous tree native to southern China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Sapindaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Litchi chinensis subsp. chinensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing potential anti-cancer properties. The tree is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to treat various ailments, and its fruits are also consumed as a nutritious food source.
